headline: Pain At The Pump: Top Energy Stocks To Buy Now As Gas Prices Surge 40% - Profit Like It's 2022
summary: The best energy stocks in 2026 may follow a similar setup as 2022, when refiners profited on refining margins from high gas prices. Click here to see the top 5 stocks.
